---
title: '2014/03/13 Journal Thur The Struggle of Forever.'
date: '2014-03-13T17:44:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '208952925072969224'
blogger_filename: '/2014/03/20140313-journal-thur-struggle-of.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<br />
<h4>
VOD:</h4>
COME:<br />
<br />
<a href="http://e.kcm.org/HM?a=ENX7CqkTRT6y8SA9MKJrmxvnGHxKL9ebv_cStGb5lw8W0bBhOG5mpqVsje_Hhe-jNFFN" target="_blank">Faith To Faith</a><br />
<table border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="background-color: white; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; width: 100%px;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="padding: 10px 10px 0px;"><div style="background-color: #e5eaee; background-image: url(http://webr.emv2.com/kcm/email/f2f/en/bg.jpg); background-repeat: repeat repeat; padding: 10px;">
<blockquote class="tr_bq" style="background-color: white; border: 1px solid rgb(214, 227, 233); color: #666666; font-size: 16px; padding: 10px 20px;">
Endure hardness, as a good soldier of Jesus Christ. - 2 Timothy 2:3</blockquote>
</div>
</td></tr>
<tr><td style="padding: 0px 15px 15px;"><blockquote style="margin-top: 15px; padding: 0px;">
Times of hardness are inevitable. You need to know that. It's true that we've been redeemed from the curse, and there's nothing Satan can do to reverse that, but he is going to challenge you on it...&nbsp;</blockquote>
<blockquote style="margin-top: 15px; padding: 0px;">
So many people hear the word of faith about healing or prosperity and they think, "Hey! I'm going to try that." Then when the hard times come, they give up and cave in.&nbsp;</blockquote>
<blockquote style="margin-top: 15px; padding: 0px;">
Let me warn you, living by faith is not something you try. It's a lifestyle. You do it when it's hard. You do it when it's easy. You do it all the time because you're not doing it just to get in on the benefits. <b>You're doing it because you know that faith pleases God (Heb. 11:6).</b></blockquote>
</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
Day 121 Joseph Prince Devotional<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #333333; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Liberation Sans', FreeSans, sans-serif; font-size: 12.222222328186035px; line-height: 24.000001907348633px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 0px;">
<a href="https://www.bible.com/users/darrellwolfe/reading-plans/28-joseph-prince?initial=true&amp;user_id=darrellwolfe" target="_blank">Jesus’ High Priesthood Is Forever</a><br />
Hebrews 6:20<br />
20… Jesus, having become High Priest forever according to the order of Melchizedek.&nbsp;</blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #333333; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Liberation Sans', FreeSans, sans-serif; font-size: 12.222222328186035px; line-height: 24.000001907348633px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 0px;">
By being our High Priest forever, Jesus also touches the blessings that He gives us with a forever effect. He touches our lives and we have eternal life. He touches our ministry and its impact becomes eternal. And the more we see His priesthood as having a forever effect, the more permanent our blessings will be.<br />
Truly, there is nothing temporal about what Jesus our High Priest does. It is not a case of blessed today, cursed tomorrow. The blessings we receive are sure and steadfast because Jesus is our High Priest today, tomorrow and forever.</blockquote>
<br />
<br />
<br />
HERE:<br />
<br />
The pain I endure as a believer has far more to do with my internal battle than my outward one. Could there be instances that I will be cold, hungry, or in pain because of the Gospel? Yes. On a daily basis the real struggle is to keep my mouth and heart steady on HIS word, keeping the FOREVER perspective in place, despite what my outward circumstances are telling me.<br />
<br />
Do I need to make more money? Yes. But not just a few thousand or even $20K a year more. I need to be brining in Billions to help fund the Gospel of Jesus Christ. That is not going to happen with a new job and a raise.<br />
<br />
So although my struggle has been to get a new job, it's that very focus that has probably prevented me from seeing what I could and should be doing with my time.<br />
<br />
<br />
DO:<br />
<br />
I'm going to spend a few moments asking God about HIS direction for me today before I even finish this post.<br />
<br />
<br />
My morning has been so clogged from breaking up fights with the kids. I'm not hearing clearly right now. I asked Him for a Forever Perspective on my life and activities.<br />
<h4>
Thankful:</h4>
Today I am thankful for the Internet. It is a powerful way to reach people, make impact, and make income.<br />
<br />
<h4>
Feeling:</h4>
Hopeful about the TD Ameritrade position. Nervous about the assessment I did for them. I need to work on math-word problems.<br />
<br />
<h4>
What's Up?</h4>
<br />
Did a phone screen yesterday morning for a "Banking Ops Rep". Job Description Below. I feel I am well able to do the job. It involves a lot more training than I realized. It would be Multiple weeks (7+) just getting licensed for investments and then more weeks for job specific training.<br />
<br />
<a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Series_7_Exam">http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Series_7_Exam</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Series_63_license">http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Series_63_license</a><br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
We'll see how I did. I did my best... I do need to practice more math!<br />
<br />
I'm learning skills for sales that helped me a little bit at WF. But it's all still very bad there. Sure I can learn to cope with the situation. Take these callers that I wouldn't have talked to before and try to help them. I can use tricks like:<br />
<br />
"I know you are 'not interested' in opening a savings account, you obviously didn't call in for that today, but maybe I can find other ways to save you time or money or help you find more financial peace? How does that sound?"<br />
<br />
And just move along.<br />
<br />
In Mandy's case nearly no-one hangs up on her after being transfered. Her only hang ups are hanging up before they get to her. MANY of my callers hang up on me. 70%. It's the approach. It's sales. It makes me sick...<br />
<br />
YES. I can use these tactics to help bring my numbers up. YES, I've been a whiny baby because I wanted callers the way my perfect little mind imagined this job should be and I don't want to become mister sales person trying to talk people into staying on the phone, or find things to sell people that don't have much.<br />
<br />
I'm done. I can't sit back for another year and watch people get transfered for no good reason, misdirected to sales to meet a warm transfer goal. Wells Fargo is NOT doing what's right for the customer and I'm done.<br />
<br />
Time to find a new job... Maybe TD Ameritrade will be a better position for me. No sales?<br />
<br />
<b style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; display: block; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 1em 0px 0px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Job Title:</b><span style="background-color: white; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px;">Rep, Banking Ops</span><b style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; display: block; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 1em 0px 0px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Job ID:</b><span style="background-color: white; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px;">102628</span><b style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; display: block; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 1em 0px 0px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Job Location:</b><span style="background-color: white; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px;">Fort Worth, Texas</span><b style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; display: block; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 1em 0px 0px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Employment Type:</b><span style="background-color: white; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px;">Full-Time</span><b style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; display: block; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 1em 0px 0px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Contract Type:</b><span style="background-color: white; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px;">Regular</span><b style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; display: block; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 1em 0px 0px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Manager Level:</b><span style="background-color: white; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px;">Support Level</span><br />
<div style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
A leader in brokerage and investment services for over 35 years, TD Ameritrade offers a full spectrum of powerful solutions and innovative tools for trading and investing. We're constantly expanding our knowledge and bolstering our capabilities, from a leading active trader program to intuitive long-term investment solutions and a national branch system. Combined with some of the industry's brightest minds, there's no limit to how big our accomplishments can be.</div>
<div style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
From first-time investors to sophisticated traders, TD Ameritrade is focused on helping individuals seek out their financial goals. And you're the ambassador to all that we do. Beginning with our trading platform and proprietary technology to our resolve to outperform, you'll maintain the high level of quality and integrity we're known for, each and every day. With the right opportunity, there's no limit to what you can accomplish.</div>
<div style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
<em style="border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">As a leading employer in financial services, we believe in building strong relationships, achieving quality results and working with integrity. It's at the heart of everything we do. That's why we provide you with comprehensive training, benefits and programs that inspire you to achieve more every day. Apply to a TD Ameritrade job today and help our clients pursue their dreams, while you fulfill yours.</em></div>
<div style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
Applicants must be eligible to work in the U.S. Immigration sponsorship is typically not available for this position.</div>
<div style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
</div>
<div style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
</div>
<div style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
<strong style="border: 0px; display: block; margin: 1em 0px 0px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Role:</strong></div>
<div style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
In this role, the Banking Operations Analyst accepts a high level of risk in performing daily activities relating to processing, analyzing, researching, and posting of all deposit and withdrawals in client accounts. These related transactions pertain to core payment methods such as inbound/outbound wires, ACH, and checks recognized by the Federal Reserve Bank and SWIFT networks. Analysts also take inbound calls regarding the mentioned processes from internal clients to assist with client requests. Analysts work to ensure prompt and accurate recording of payments to client accounts within allotted Service Levels. Other responsibilities associated with the position include developing strong relationships with internal business partners, executing internal controls to mitigate risk, and obtaining regulatory and banking industry certifications as assigned such as the American Banking Association diploma/certificate.</div>
<div style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
This role is complex as it requires a dynamic ability to understand several different payment cycles, such as cut off times for the Federal Reserve and SWIFT networks, as well as the regulations associated with them. Examples include wires, checks, ACH and debit card functionality. In addition to understanding the brokerage environment, Analysts must have a specific knowledge of the banking industry. Analysts must have a working knowledge of processes and procedures for Institutional, Retail, and Branch requests.</div>
<div style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
The risk in this role is extremely high due to the potential of large monetary loss. Inaccurate processing can put the firm at significant risk as well as our client accounts. For example, an error can not only cause issues for the client account balances, but could also create risk for net capital requirements for the firm. On a weekly basis the department may process approximately $2 billion in transactions. In addition to financial risk, Analysts also have regulatory and legal risk that could lead to exposure the firm to fines as well as potential disciplinary actions by regulatory agencies. There is also risk in this role when dealing with restricted country and foreign accounts due to government requirements, internal regulations and industry guidance in an effort to prevent loss, fraud, or illegal fund movement.</div>
<div style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
The debit card functionality on client accounts is unique to TD Ameritrade when compared to other brokerage firms. Also with wire and check processing, Analysts must use multiple systems to analyze and process requests in order to ensure proper verification and posting.</div>
<div style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
This role is critical to other TD Ameritrade teams/departments. Without this roles existence, client deposits or withdrawals would not be able to be completed. These functions are the core of funding accounts, obtaining assets, and growing the company. The payments group is at the core of any monetary transaction that is completed at the firm or client level.</div>
<div style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
This role is critical to the client as clients depend on this role for accurately making payments to and from their accounts. If clients are unable to make deposits, they will not be able to trade. In addition, if clients need to withdraw funds and it is not completed accurately and timely, resulting ramifications will be severe and legal action can occur.</div>
<div style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
This role is critical to the shareholder as shareholder value is based upon our ability to obtain new client assets. Without the ability to quickly and properly deposit client funds we will fail on one of our major CEO goals. Any error large enough could impact earnings per share.</div>
<div style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
The predictability in this role is based on many different events such as changes in interest rates, daily news, etc. which can result in very aggressive volume spikes that will require an Analyst migrating from a planned function to where they are most needed with very little advance notice. Cross training and a wide spread knowledge base is crucial. For example, if an Analyst is working in a particular queue and we have a large drop of checks that come in, they will need to shift focus and flex into the checking queues to assist. Analysts work in approximately 5-15 different processes a day to ensure client’s funds are accurately take care of.</div>
<div style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
Within this role, unexpected events such as volume increases, system outages, fraud attempts, and the need to recover funds sent in error are possibilities. We may also see changes in regulatory, AML guidelines, and foreign restricted countries. It is important to maintain a high level of emotional intelligence to not commit mistakes as the busy atmosphere challenges the attention levels of the staff.</div>
<div style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
Primary departments that this role works with includes: Retail Investor Services and Branch Network as well as Institutional, Retirement Account Services, Cage, Alternative Investments, Government Reporting, Operations Control and ACATS/ATS. These groups call for status, resolving resolution items, expedite requests, and researching an error or issue. They also work with Risk, Fraud and AML for flagging of suspicious activity in accounts. This role will work with Margins for approving disbursements out of an account with margin capability. Other departments may include Mutual Funds, Product, Treasury and Think Tech.</div>
<div style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
This role interacts with external clients. This role is required to interact with several of our largest vendors on a daily basis. These include the First National Bank of Omaha, TD Bank USA, Wells Fargo, and FIS/Metavante. These vendors handle the transactional execution to the Federal Reserve for the payments that TD Ameritrade generates and rectifying exceptions.</div>
<div style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
<strong style="border: 0px; display: block; margin: 1em 0px 0px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Responsibilities:</strong></div>
<ul style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; list-style: none; margin: 0px 0px 1em; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Accurate daily processing of cash transactions postings and withdrawals to client accounts via ISIS or inbound phones including payments made by Automated Clearing House (ACH), Wire Transfer, lockbox (checks) and branch deposits as well as Fed Adjustment processing, stop payments, and deposit chargeback’s.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Accurately processing of debit transactions from client accounts.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Analyze incoming and outgoing payments for review of money laundering, OFAC, and fraud.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Analyze client accounts as well as funding/withdrawal request to ensure the request is in good order for processing via ISIS or inbound phones. Examples of verification may consist of: verifying the correct information, available balances, IRA coding (if applicable) and third party paperwork requirements are met.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Identify issues with exception processing, remedy wire and check suspense transactions to avoid accounting discrepancies and escalate issues and approvals as appropriate.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Conducts research and settlement of Treasury, Mutual Funds, and International business functions by verifying transaction instructions, amount and reason.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Liaise with business partners for resolution of client escalations via telephone or workflow research cases regarding payment transactions.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Leverage Lean principals to identify inefficiencies in existing processes and develop capacity through reengineering.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Makes quick, educated decisions on client transactions requiring immediate attention which includes moving cash between accounts, allowing cash transactions to be withdrawn or identifying homeless deposits for correction or flagging for suspicious activity.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Interface with Loss Prevention, Operations Control, and Treasury to safeguard client and firm funds through collaborative efforts.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Receives inbound correspondence from Retail, Brokerage Operations departments and Institutional Service teams daily with specialized banking questions and concerns. This is done through established and dedicated phone lines, email, case workflows, and instant message.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Working with vendors to ensure funds are appropriately distributed and received on a daily basis. For example reconciliation with First National Bank and Wells Fargo.</li>
</ul>
<div style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
<strong style="border: 0px; display: block; margin: 1em 0px 0px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Requirements:</strong></div>
<ul style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; list-style: none; margin: 0px 0px 1em; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">High School Diploma required</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">4 year college degree in Business/Finance Preferred</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">1-2 years Financial Services experience preferred</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Collaborative personality with a team-building attitude.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Attention to detail and high accuracy.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Strong communication skills and the ability to assume a high level of risk and responsibility in a rapidly changing environment.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Experience integrating new technologies into operational functions.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Schedule flexibility for weekend and staggered shift schedules</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Proficient in Microsoft Office applications, preferred.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Banking Industry knowledge, preferred.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Experience in timeline/deadline driven work environment, preferred.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Experience with Remote Capture Software (check 21), preferred.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Ability to learn, retain and apply new information and skills in an efficient and effective manner.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Ability to apply analytical skills for effective problem solving towards the goal of continuous improvement.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Ability to collaborate within and across teams.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Communicates with thoroughness and clarity in an honest and transparent manner.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Flexible and responsive to change.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Able to focus and perform under stress.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Works with high sense of urgency.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Displays resiliency when facing challenges.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Consistently displays professionalism and composure across all circumstances, environments and personnel.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Participates in meetings in an engaged and positive manner.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Displays respect for the dignity and opinions of others.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Consistently assumes positive intent relative to peers and business partners.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Consistently remains solution and progress-focused.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Consistently open and responsive to coaching.</li>
<li style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; list-style: disc outside none; margin: 10px 0px 5px 20px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">Recognizes own performance improvement opportunities and strives to develop knowledge and skills.</li>
</ul>
<div style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #878787; font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, 'Helvetica Neue Light', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 10px 0px 15px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
<div style="border: 0px; margin: 10px 0px 15px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
<div style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
TD Ameritrade participates in the E-Verify program for those states requiring E-Verify. For additional information on this program please&nbsp;<a class="pdf-link" href="http://www.amtd.com/common/download/download.cfm?companyid=AMTD&amp;fileid=538245&amp;filekey=6367ed8c-5b19-437f-98ec-e7fd37702043&amp;filename=EverifyPosterEnglish_1_.pdf" style="border: 0px; color: #328894; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline;" target="_blank"><span style="color: #0158c4;">click here</span></a>.</div>
<div style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
TD Ameritrade is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We value diversity and offer a quality workplace.</div>
<div style="border: 0px; line-height: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">
TD Ameritrade, Inc. member FINRA/SIPC/NFA is a subsidiary of TD Ameritrade Holding Corporation (NASDAQ: AMTD). TD Ameritrade is a trademark jointly owned by TD Ameritrade IP Company and the Toronto-Dominion Bank.<strong style="border: 0px; display: block; margin: 1em 0px 0px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;">©</strong>2012 TD Ameritrade IP Company, Inc. All rights reserved. Used with permission.</div>
</div>
</div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
</h4>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
